messages.content:
| | | --- | | | | | | | | | | Jiazi Bu | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
| |

| |

Jiazi Bu 卜家梓 | |

| |

| |

I am a 1st year Ph.D. student and research intern at Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, advised by Prof. Dahua Lin. | | I received the B.Eng. degree in Artificial Intelligence (GuoZhi Class Programme, held by Prof. Xiaoou Tang and Prof. Cewu Lu) from Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU). | | Moreover, I have also worked with Prof. Junchi Yan at SJTU-ReThinkLab. | |

| |

My current research focuses on 2D AIGC and VLM. Prior to that, I worked on Computer Vision and AI4Science. | |

| |

| | I am seeking for a joint Ph.D. position from 2026 fall. | |

| |

| | Email: bujiazi001@sjtu.edu.cn  /  | | CV  /  | | Scholar  /  | | GitHub | |

| | 		| | | |
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
| | 🔥 News | |

2025-09: Begin my Ph.D. at Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory.

| |

2025-09: 1 paper accepted to NeurIPS 2025 (as First Author).

| |

2025-06: My Bachelor's Thesis is awarded the Best Bachelor's Thesis of SJTU.

| |

2025-06: I receive an additional Zhiyuan Honor Bachelor's Degree from SJTU.

| |

2025-06: I receive my B.Eng. Degree from SJTU (as one of TOP 30 Outstanding Graduates).

| |

2025-06: 1 paper accepted to ICCV 2025 (as Co-First Author).

| |

2025-02: 1 paper accepted to CVPR 2025 (as First Author).

| |

2025-01: 1 paper accepted to ICLR 2025 (as Co-First Author).

| |

2025-01: 1 paper accepted to SCIENCE CHINA Information Sciences.

| |

2024-09: 1 paper accepted to NeurIPS 2024.

| |

2023-11: 1 paper accepted to AAAI 2024.

| |

2023-11: I receive National First Prize & First Prize in Shanghai Chapter in CUMCM 2023.

| |

2021-08: I enter Shanghai Jiao Tong University (SJTU) as an undergraduate student.

透明度可以调低一些吗
